title: glyceria dives
intro: Glyceria dives, also known as small-fruited mannagrass or small mannagrass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Glyceria dives is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
